fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved

fields.name: RCV_OFF
fields.description: analog part of the receiver is switched off

fields.name: POWER_DOWN
fields.description: Soft power-down mode entered. Remark: The PowerDown bit cannot be set when the SoftReset command is activated

fields.name: Command
fields.description: activates a command based on the Command value; reading this register shows which command is executed; see Section 10.3 on page 70

fields.name: RESERVED_5_3
fields.description: Reserved for future use

fields.name: T_STOP_NOW
fields.description: Timer stops immediately; reading this bit always returns it to logic 0

fields.name: T_START_NOW
fields.description: Timer starts immediately; reading this bit always returns it to logic 0

fields.name: RX_LAST_BITS
fields.description: Indicates the number of valid bits in the last received byte; 000b means whole byte is valid

Interrupt System.name: COM_IEN_REG
Interrupt System.description: Control bits to enable and disable the passing of interrupt requests

fields.name: IRQ_INV
fields.description: signal on pin IRQ is inverted with respect to the Status1Reg register's IRq bit

fields.name: TX_IEN
fields.description: allows the transmitter interrupt request (TxIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: RX_IEN
fields.description: allows the receiver interrupt request (RxIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: IDLE_IEN
fields.description: allows the idle interrupt request (IdleIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: HI_ALERT_IEN
fields.description: allows the high alert interrupt request (HiAlertIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: LO_ALERT_IEN
fields.description: allows the low alert interrupt request (LoAlertIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: ERR_IEN
fields.description: allows the error interrupt request (ErrIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: TIMER_IEN
fields.description: allows the timer interrupt request (TimerIRq bit) to be propagated to pin IRQ

Interrupt System.name: DIV_IEN_REG
Interrupt System.description: Control bits to enable and disable the passing of interrupt requests

fields.name: RESERVED_6_5
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_3
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_1_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: IRQ_PUSH_PULL
fields.description: pin IRQ is a standard CMOS output pin

fields.name: MFIN_ACT_IEN
fields.description: allows the MFIN active interrupt request to be propagated to pin IRQ

fields.name: CRCI_EN
fields.description: allows the CRC interrupt request to be propagated to pin IRQ

Interrupt System.name: ComIrqReg
Interrupt System.description: ComIrq register with TxIRq, CRCRq, RxIRq, IdleIRq, HiAlertIRq, LoAlertIRq, ErrIRq bits

fields.name: SET1
fields.description: indicates that the marked bits in the ComIrqReg register are set

fields.name: TX_IRQ
fields.description: set immediately after the last bit of the transmitted data was sent out

fields.name: RX_IRQ
fields.description: receiver has detected the end of a valid data stream

fields.name: IDLE_IRQ
fields.description: If a command terminates, for example, when the CommandReg changes its value from any command to the Idle command

fields.name: HI_ALERT_IRQ
fields.description: the Status1Reg register's HiAlert bit is set

fields.name: LO_ALERT_IRQ
fields.description: Status1Reg register's LoAlert bit is set

fields.name: ERR_IRQ
fields.description: any error bit in the ErrorReg register is set

fields.name: TIMER_IRQ
fields.description: the timer decrements the timer value in register TCounterValReg to zero

fields.name: RESERVED_6_5
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_3
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_1_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: SET2
fields.description: indicates that the marked bits in the DivIrqReg register are set

fields.name: MFIN_ACT_IRQ
fields.description: MFIN is active this interrupt is set when either a rising or falling signal edge is detected

fields.name: CRC_IRQ
fields.description: the CalcCRC command is active and all data is processed

FIFO.name: FIFODataReg
FIFO.description: FIFO buffer input and output data bus register

fields.name: DATA
fields.description: FIFO buffer data byte

FIFO.name: FIFOLevelReg
FIFO.description: Register indicating distance between FIFO write and read pointers

fields.name: FLUSH_BUFFER
fields.description: immediately clears the internal FIFO buffer's read and write pointer

fields.name: FIFO_LEVEL
fields.description: indicates the number of bytes stored in the FIFO buffer

FIFO.name: WaterLevelReg
FIFO.description: Defines the level for FIFO under- and overflow warning

fields.name: RESERVED_7_6
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: WATER_LEVEL
fields.description: Defines the level for FIFO under- and overflow warning

Status.name: Status1Reg
Status.description: Contains status bits of the CRC, interrupt and FIFO buffer

fields.name: RESERVED_7
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_2
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: CRC_OK
fields.description: the CRC result is zero

fields.name: CRC_READY
fields.description: the CRC calculation has finished

fields.name: IRQ
fields.description: indicates if any interrupt source requests attention

fields.name: T_RUNNING
fields.description: MFRC522's timer unit is running

fields.name: HI_ALERT
fields.description: the number of bytes stored in the FIFO buffer corresponds to equation

fields.name: LO_ALERT
fields.description: the number of bytes stored in the FIFO buffer corresponds to equation

Status.name: Status2Reg
Status.description: Contains status bits of the receiver, transmitter and data mode detector

fields.name: RESERVED_5_4
fields.description: reserved

fields.name: TEMP_SENS_CLEAR
fields.description: clears the temperature error if the temperature is below the alarm limit

fields.name: I2C_FORCE_HS
fields.description: the I^2 C-bus input filter is set to the High-speed mode

fields.name: MF_CRYPTO1_ON
fields.description: indicates that the MIFARE Crypto1 unit is switched on

fields.name: MODEM_STATE
fields.description: shows the state of the transmitter and receiver state machines

CRC.name: CRCResultReg
CRC.description: CRC calculation result register - higher byte

fields.name: CRC_RESULT
fields.description: CRC result higher byte

CRC.name: CRC_RESULT_REG_MSB
CRC.description: CRCResultReg higher bits - shows MSB of CRC calculation

fields.name: CRC_RESULT_MSB
fields.description: shows the value of the CRCResultReg register's most significant byte only valid if Status1Reg register's CRCReady bit is set to logic 1

CRC.name: CRCResultReg
CRC.description: CRC calculation result register - lower byte

fields.name: CRC_RESULT
fields.description: CRC result lower byte

CRC.name: CRC_RESULT_REG_LSB
CRC.description: CRCResultReg lower bits - shows LSB of CRC calculation

fields.name: CRC_RESULT_LSB
fields.description: shows the value of the least significant byte of the CRCResultReg register only valid if Status1Reg register's CRCReady bit is set to logic 1

Error.name: ErrorReg
Error.description: Error bit register showing the error status of the last command executed

fields.name: RESERVED_5
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: WR_ERR
fields.description: data is written into the FIFO buffer by the host during the MFAuthent command

fields.name: TEMP_ERR
fields.description: internal temperature sensor detects overheating

fields.name: BUFFER_OVFL
fields.description: the host or a MFRC522's internal state machine tries to write data to the FIFO buffer even though it is already full

fields.name: COLL_ERR
fields.description: a bit-collision is detected

fields.name: CRC_ERR
fields.description: the RxModeReg register's RxCRCEn bit is set and the CRC calculation fails

fields.name: PARITY_ERR
fields.description: parity check failed

fields.name: PROTOCOL_ERR
fields.description: set to logic 1 if the SOF is incorrect

TX.name: ModeReg
TX.description: Defines general mode settings for transmitting and receiving

fields.name: RESERVED_6
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_4
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_2
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: MSBFIRST
fields.description: CRC coprocessor calculates the CRC with MSB first

fields.name: TXWAITRF
fields.description: transmitter can only be started if an RF field is generated

fields.name: POLMFIN
fields.description: defines the polarity of pin MFIN

fields.name: CRCPRESET
fields.description: defines the preset value for the CRC coprocessor

TX.name: TxModeReg
TX.description: Defines the data rate during transmission

fields.name: TXCRCEN
fields.description: enables CRC generation during data transmission

fields.name: TXSPEED
fields.description: defines the bit rate during data transmission

fields.name: INVMOD
fields.description: modulation of transmitted data is inverted

fields.name: TxLastBits
fields.description: used for transmission of bit oriented frames: defines the number of bits of the last byte that will be transmitted 000b indicates that all bits of the last byte will be transmitted

TX.name: TxControlReg
TX.description: Controls the logical behavior of the antenna driver pins TX1 and TX2

fields.name: RESERVED_2
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: INVTX2RFON
fields.description: output signal on pin TX2 inverted when driver TX2 is enabled

fields.name: INVTX1RFON
fields.description: output signal on pin TX1 inverted when driver TX1 is enabled

fields.name: INVTX2RFOFF
fields.description: output signal on pin TX2 inverted when driver TX2 is disabled

fields.name: INVTX1RFOFF
fields.description: output signal on pin TX1 inverted when driver TX1 is disabled

fields.name: TX2CW
fields.description: output signal on pin TX2 continuously delivers unmodulated carrier

fields.name: TX2RFEN
fields.description: output signal on pin TX2 delivers modulated carrier

fields.name: TX1RFEN
fields.description: output signal on pin TX1 delivers modulated carrier

quality_issues: outlier field count (8 fields vs median 1)
all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)

TX.name: TxASKReg

fields.name: RESERVED_7
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_5_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: FORCE100ASK
fields.description: forces a 100 %ASK modulation

quality_issues: all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)

TX.name: TxSelReg
TX.description: Selects the internal sources for the analog module

fields.name: RESERVED_7_6
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: DRIVERSEL
fields.description: selects the input of drivers TX1 and TX2

fields.name: MFOUTSEL
fields.description: MF output select

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: TX_WAIT
fields.description: defines the additional response time 7 bits are added to the value of the register bit by default

fields.name: MOD_WIDTH
fields.description: defines the width of the Miller modulation as multiples of the carrier frequency (ModWidth + 1 / f_clk ) the maximum value is half the bit period

RX.name: RxModeReg
RX.description: Defines the data rate during reception

fields.name: RESERVED_1_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RXCRCEN
fields.description: enables the CRC calculation during reception

fields.name: RXSPEED
fields.description: defines the bit rate while receiving data

fields.name: RXNOERR
fields.description: an invalid received data stream will be ignored

fields.name: RXMULTIPLE
fields.description: able to receive more than one data frame

quality_issues: outlier field count (5 fields vs median 1)
all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)

fields.name: UART_SEL
fields.description: selects the input of the contactless UART

fields.name: RX_WAIT
fields.description: after data transmission the activation of the receiver is delayed for RxWait bit-clocks

RX.name: RxThresholdReg
RX.description: Selects thresholds for the bit decoder

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: MIN_LEVEL
fields.description: defines the minimum signal strength at the decoder input that will be accepted if the signal strength is below this level it is not evaluated

fields.name: COLL_LEVEL
fields.description: defines the minimum signal strength at the decoder input that must be reached by the weaker half-bit of the Manchester encoded signal to generate a bit-collision relative to the amplitude of the stronger half-bit

RX.name: DemodReg

fields.name: ADD_IQ
fields.description: defines the use of I and Q channel during reception Remark: the FixIQ bit must be set to logic 0 to enable the following settings: 00 selects the stronger channel 01 selects the stronger channel and freezes the selected channel during communication 10 reserved 11 reserved

fields.name: FIX_IQ
fields.description: if AddIQ[1:0] are set to X0b, the reception is fixed to I channel if AddIQ[1:0] are set to X1b, the reception is fixed to Q channel

fields.name: TPRESCAL_EVEN
fields.description: Available on RC522 version 1.0 and version 2.0: If set to logic 0 the following formula is used to calculate the timer frequency of the prescaler: f_timer = 13.56 MHz / (2*TPreScaler+1). Only available on version 2.0: If set to logic 1 the following formula is used to calculate the timer frequency of the prescaler: f_timer = 13.56 MHz / (2*TPreScaler+2). Default TPrescalEven bit is logic 0, find more information on the prescaler in Section 8.5.

fields.name: TAU_RCV
fields.description: changes the time-constant of the internal PLL during data reception Remark: if set to 00b the PLL is frozen during data reception

fields.name: TAU_SYNC
fields.description: changes the time-constant of the internal PLL during burst

quality_issues: outlier field count (5 fields vs median 1)
all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)

fields.name: RESERVED_7_5
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_3_0
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: PARITY_DISABLE
fields.description: generation of the parity bit for transmission and the parity check for receiving is switched off the received parity bit is handled like a data bit

fields.name: RESERVED_3
fields.description: Reserved for future use

fields.name: START_SEND
fields.description: Starts the transmission of data; only valid in combination with the Transceive command

fields.name: RX_ALIGN
fields.description: Defines the bit position for the first bit received to be stored in the FIFO buffer

fields.name: TX_LAST_BITS
fields.description: Defines the number of bits of the last byte that will be transmitted; 000b means all bits

Bit Framing.name: CollReg
Bit Framing.description: Defines the first bit-collision detected on the RF interface.

fields.name: Set1
fields.description: indicates that the marked bits in the ComIrqReg register are set

fields.name: CRCResultMSB
fields.description: shows the value of the CRCResultReg register's most significant byte only valid if Status1Reg register's CRCReady bit is set to logic 1

RF Analog.name: RFCfgReg

fields.name: RESERVED_7
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RESERVED_3_0

fields.name: RX_GAIN
fields.description: defines the receiver's signal voltage gain factor

RF Analog.name: GsNReg
RF Analog.description: Defines conductance of antenna driver pins TX1 and TX2 for n-driver

fields.name: CW_GSN
fields.description: defines the conductance of the output n-driver during periods without modulation

fields.name: MOD_GSN
fields.description: defines the conductance of the output n-driver during periods with modulation

RF Analog.name: CWGsPReg
RF Analog.description: Defines conductance of p-driver output during periods of no modulation

fields.name: RESERVED_7_6
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: CW_GSP
fields.description: defines the conductance of the p-driver output

RF Analog.name: ModGsPReg
RF Analog.description: Defines conductance of p-driver output during modulation

fields.name: RESERVED_7_6
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: MOD_GSP
fields.description: defines the conductance of the p-driver output during modulation

Timer.name: TModeReg
Timer.description: Timer mode register - defines timer settings

fields.name: TAUTO
fields.description: timer starts automatically at the end of the transmission

fields.name: TGATED
fields.description: internal timer is running in gated mode

fields.name: TAUTO_RESTART
fields.description: timer automatically restarts its count-down from the 16-bit timer reload value

fields.name: TPRESCALER_HI
fields.description: TPrescaler setting higher 4 bits

fields.name: TPRESCALER_LO
fields.description: defines the lower 8 bits of the TPrescaler value

fields.name: RELOAD
fields.description: Timer reload value MSB

fields.name: TRELOAD_VAL_HI
fields.description: defines the higher 8 bits of the 16-bit timer reload value

fields.name: RELOAD
fields.description: Timer reload value LSB

fields.name: TRELOAD_VAL_LO
fields.description: defines the lower 8 bits of the 16-bit timer reload value

fields.name: COUNTER
fields.description: Timer counter MSB

fields.name: TCOUNTERVAL_HI
fields.description: timer value higher 8 bits

fields.name: COUNTER
fields.description: Timer counter LSB

fields.name: TCOUNTERVAL_LO
fields.description: timer value lower 8 bits

fields.name: BR_T1
fields.description: BR_T1[4:0] factor for transfer speed (33 to 64 range for bits 7-3)

fields.name: BR_T0
fields.description: BR_T0[2:0] factor for transfer speed

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: TSTBUSBITSEL
fields.description: selects a test bus signal which is output at pin MFOUT if AnalogSelAux2[3:0] = FFh in AnalogTestReg register

Test and Debug.name: TestSel2Reg
Test and Debug.description: General test signal configuration and PRBS control

fields.name: TSTBUSFLIP
fields.description: test bus is mapped to the parallel port in the following order: TstBusBit4,TstBusBit3, TstBusBit2, TstBusBit6, TstBusBit5, TstBusBit0

fields.name: PRBS9
fields.description: starts and enables the PRBS9 sequence according to ITU-TO150

fields.name: PRBS15
fields.description: starts and enables the PRBS15 sequence according to ITU-TO150

fields.name: TESTBUSSEL
fields.description: selects the test bus; see Section 16.1 'Test signals'

Test and Debug.name: TestPinEnReg
Test and Debug.description: Enables the test bus pin output driver

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: RS232LINEEN
fields.description: serial UART lines MX and DTRQ are disabled

fields.name: TESTPINEN
fields.description: enables the output driver on one of the data pins D1 to D7 which outputs a test signal

Test and Debug.name: TestPinValueReg
Test and Debug.description: Defines the HIGH and LOW values for the test port D1 to D7 when it is used as I/O

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: USEIO
fields.description: enables the I/O functionality for the test port

fields.name: TESTPINVALUE
fields.description: defines the value of the test port when it is used as I/O

Test and Debug.name: TestBusReg
Test and Debug.description: Shows the status of the internal test bus

fields.name: TESTBUS
fields.description: shows the status of the internal test bus the test bus is selected using the TestSel2Reg register

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: reserved for production tests

fields.name: AMPRCV
fields.description: internal signal processing in the receiver chain is performed non-linearly

fields.name: RFT
fields.description: reserved for production tests

fields.name: SELFTEST
fields.description: enables the digital self test the self test can also be started by the CalcCRC command

fields.name: VERSION
fields.description: MFRC522 version 1.0 software version is: 91h. MFRC522 version 2.0 software version is: 92h

Test and Debug.name: AnalogTestReg
Test and Debug.description: Determines the analog output test signal at, and status of, pins AUX1 and AUX2

fields.name: ANALOGSELAUX1
fields.description: controls pin AUX1

fields.name: ANALOGSELAUX2
fields.description: controls pin AUX2

Test and Debug.name: TestDAC1Reg
Test and Debug.description: Defines the test value for TestDAC1

fields.name: RESERVED_
fields.description: reserved for production tests

fields.name: TEST_DAC1
fields.description: defines the test value for TestDAC1 output of DAC1 can be routed to AUX1 by setting value AnalogSelAux1[3:0] to 0001b in the AnalogTestReg register

Test and Debug.name: TestDAC2Reg
Test and Debug.description: Defines the test value for TestDAC2

fields.name: RESERVED_7_6
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: TEST_DAC2
fields.description: defines the test value for TestDAC2 output of DAC2 can be routed to AUX2 by setting value AnalogSelAux2[3:0] to 0001b in the AnalogTestReg register

Test and Debug.name: TestADCReg
Test and Debug.description: Shows the values of ADC I and Q channels

fields.name: ADC_I
fields.description: ADC I channel value
